label: Case Response
description: An entry in a case's discussion thread (CASE-481 fork 3): respond / comment / close / implement. Append-only, immutable event — you never edit a posted response, you add another (so the case body stops re-versioning per comment; status changes live on CASE_RECORD, discourse lives here). Identity is the composite [case_number, response_seq] — response_seq is a gateway-assigned monotonic sequence per case, giving an addressable human handle ('CASE-478 #3'), dedup safety, and no timestamp-in-identity (PoNIF #3). Linked to its case by the RESPONDS_TO edge.
